items.title: Hegseth says clock paused on deadline to seek approval for Iran war
items.summary: The US defence secretary says the timer for the president to report to Congress "pauses or stops" in a ceasefire.

items.title: Billions of meals at risk due to Iran war, says fertiliser boss
items.summary: A shortage of fertiliser due to the Iran conflict could reduce crop yields and push prices higher, says the boss of Yara.

items.title: War criminal Mladic close to death, say lawyers asking judge for jail release
items.summary: Mladic, 84, was jailed for life for genocide, war crimes and crimes against humanity during the Bosnian war in 1992-95.

items.title: Retail spending fell in March as consumers pull back
items.summary: Spending at US retailers fell in March as consumers pulled back amid recessionary fears fueled by the banking crisis.

items.title: 伊朗提新談判方案 川普不滿意：領導層一團亂能達成協議？
items.summary: 伊朗提出最新的談判方案，不過，美國總統川普對於內容並不滿意，還說伊朗的領導階層派系分裂「一團亂」，他懷疑對方是否有能力接受任何協議。  消息人士透露，伊朗已向調解方巴基斯坦提...…

items.title: 緊鄰台灣！陸上自衛隊 5/17起演訓 首次聚焦日本西南離島
items.summary: 日本防衛省宣布，陸上自衛隊最高作戰指揮單位「陸上總隊」將於本月首次以鄰近台灣的西南離島為核心，實施部隊部署與物資運輸演習，並將與駐紮沖繩的美國陸戰隊進行指揮管制訓練，同時在宮...…

items.title: 不小心長得像習近平！他抖音發自拍照賣貝殼 慘被官方懲處
items.summary: 在中國長得像領導人習近平也不行！中國一名男子在「抖音」宣傳自家售賣的貝殼海螺。沒想到，因為自己長相與習近平神似，竟遭平台判定違規，刪除他的自拍照及頭像，還禁止他30天內修改個人資...…
